data.name: Broke in Isekai
data.detailed_description:
Broke and down on your luck, you enter a portal to another world, only to find out that your fortunes there aren't any better. Broke in another world, you have to find a way to survive in a corrupt city. At least there are beautiful women of various fantastical races to build relationships with.

In order to survive in this new world, you'll have to train and up your stats and do jobs to feed yourself and pay for lodging. You could join the thriving criminal world and work as a thief, hired merc, drug dealer, and pimp. You could take more common jobs like working as a clerk at a library or a laborer at underground farms. You could try your luck in the arena or put your life on the line in a dungeon where you could hunt dangerous monsters and mine loot for profit. You could try to join the city guards. Try to get involved in the city politics. There are many opportunities that await you accompanied by women of various professions.

Courting the various women in this new world will help you develop an identity and decide who it is you want to be. Maybe you'd like to take over the city as its new ruler. Maybe you just want to go back home. The choice is yours.

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
